title: FeeConvergence error gives no actionable recovery hint
description: tx_error.rs TxBuildError::FeeConvergence prints 'fee convergence failed after N iterations'. A user seeing this at 2am has no idea what caused it or what to do. The comment in tx_builder.rs says 'this should not be possible in practice' — if true, it should say so in the error message and suggest 'please report this as a bug'. If it can happen with adversarial notes, the message should say 'try consolidating notes first'.
